title: Set up WebSocket real-time communication in Next.js with Socket.io
summary: Add Socket.io to a Next.js project using a custom Node.js server, with typed events, rooms, and Upstash Redis adapter for multi-instance scaling.
declaration: I will add real-time WebSocket communication to this Next.js project using Socket.io and a custom Node.js server. This covers typed events, rooms for group broadcasting, and a Redis adapter so it scales across multiple server instances. If you prefer a managed real-time service (Ably, Pusher, PartyKit), say so before I begin.
